steps.title: Read the contrast signal
steps.content: The underlined sentence defines vertical gene transfer and horizontal gene transfer, using on the other hand to contrast the two processes.

steps.title: Reject unsupported functions
steps.content:
• Choice A claims the sentence proposes future research, but it only defines terms.
  • Choice C says the sentence argues similarity, but it highlights difference.
  • Choice D claims it corrects a misconception, which happens later in the passage.

steps.title: Describe the definition method
steps.content: The sentence explains horizontal gene transfer by contrasting it with the somewhat similar process of vertical gene transfer. The answer is B.
